claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Power your products with unparalleled real-time, web-wide research and Q&A capabilities.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: "Pricing" is listed as a link on the homepage.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: "Getting started is simple and fast—make your first API call within minutes."

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: The Agent API now supports Claude Opus 4.7, GPT-5.5, and Grok 4.20 Reasoning — extending model choice for tool-calling, structured outputs, and fallback chains.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: "API Key Management: Security Upgrade - We’ve upgraded API key management with a one-time reveal model: full token values are now returned only at the moment of creation and cannot be retrieved again from the console or any endpoint."
